                      DJ GOT US F LLING IN LOVE AGAIN - Usher

E|E|---------------------------------------------------

E|----------------------------|| 

First Submitted: August 8th 2010
Last Updated: September 2011

Tabbed by: Wayne S
Tuning: 1/2 step down Eb Ab Db Gb Bb eb

G#m  466444
F#   244322
E    022100

Scroll down to the bottom for the version with standard
 tuning. However, it should be noted
that this tab is optimised for the version tuned half a
 step down with no capo (especially
the intro).

The intro can actually be played throughout most of the
 song, but it's a bit tricky to be
able to sing while playing it. You'll need to get used 
to the rhythm. The numbers
in squared brackets
can replace the chords if you wish to do so.

[1] -> G#m
[2] -> F#
[3] -> First E
[4] -> Second E

Please leave any 
comments/ratings/corrections/suggestions.

The way to play it with standard tuning

Tuning: Standard EADGBE

Either play it with no capo, or with capo on 3 and 
easier chords:

1) No Capo:
Chords:

Gm  355333 or 10-10-12-12-11-10
F   133211 or 8-8-10-10-10-8
Eb  668886

2) Capo: 3
Chords:

Em  022000
D   x00232
C   032010

For capo on 3 version, replace chords as follows:

Gm -> Em
F -> D
Eb -> C
